title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous & async APIs for chat, completion, embeddings, and model ops.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, embed, and pull models inside Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Unofficial Go CLI for Ollama with colored output, progress bars, and model file helpers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server containerized.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Template repo showing how to build a Chainlit conversational UI backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension embedding Ollama models into Camunda 7/8 BPMN workflows for AI tasks.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama, enabling reproducible installs on NixOS and via nix-shell.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model in guild channels.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that brings local AI assistance to your knowledge base via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models from Slack.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/await bindings to Ollama’s REST API for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that proxies Ollama, adds user quotas, model caching, and admin dashboard.
